Sure but it’s written by someone at 3am and you’re getting my crazy notes as well
||0:19 is main morimens motif I believe. Either that or mythag 
1:01 is hazy moon/workhouse orphan motif 
1:30 is wrapping paper/aigis’ personal motif 
2:02 onwards is a mix of Lily and I think helot shares some parts in her special ops
3:27 is the lemuria(?) motif. At least it plays a lot in chap 5-6 and arc 2 chap 4
4:25 is From The Oblivion, and heard throughout the whole song and the first few notes are the motif that appear during most aeon related things. (Final phase of chap 7 boss if I’m not crazy. A bit in one of GRamona’s themes, main motif for chap 8-9. But I usually just call it the oblivion motif)
6:30 I’m not too sure how to classify this motif as I believe it’s used quite a bit. I’m not sure. Could be keeper’s or I’m misremembering. It may be 3am right now. Regardless it fades back into oblivion
7:30-9 my sleepyhead memory is failing me I can’t place these... 
9:00 song of memento
10:35 is another often used main motif, I don’t remember if it’s mythag’s in particular though||
